title: libanotis pyrenaica subvar. libanotis
intro: Libanotis pyrenaica subvar. libanotis, also known as mountain calabrian, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Libanotis pyrenaica subvar. libanotis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
